attributes.action: Reduce the price on female sanitary products,
attributes.additional_details: I would like parliament or government to do something about the insane prices of female products because I think all women will agree that it is way to expensive and we can't control the fact we get a period every month. I don't think it's fair that we have to pay that much
attributes.background: Make female products less expensive because I don't know why we have to pay so much for something we can't help,

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Fund free female sanitary products for all women and girls
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/756958
